title: Utf
purpose: `encoding/utf.vitl` is a public stdlib surface inside the `encoding` family. It should be read as one focused slice of the broader family responsibility: Text and byte encoding surfaces such as utf, base64, url, hex, html, legacy encodings, and unicode helpers.
use_cases: A JSON payload can be rendered first, then base64-encoded for transport.
A path or URL can be normalized before joining it with host-facing code.
